_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of SQL for data querying, including joins, aggregations, window functions, subqueries, and query optimization fundamentals.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI TF domain. Knowledge TF-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-001 (AB, cosine: 0.518), DA-K-008 (DA, cosine: 0.505).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.584). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, query]. NICE-only terms [languages] vs WIDAI-only terms [aggregations, data, functions, fundamentals, joins, optimization] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.893 (P=0.926, R=0.862). P exceeds R by 0.064 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 16 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of query languages" and "Knowledge of SQL for data querying, including joins, aggregations, window functi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.653 > STS 0.584 (gap +0.069). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge, query] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.6%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, query]. NICE-only: [languages]. WIDAI-only: [aggregations, data, functions, fundamentals, joins, optimization].
